reviews.review_title: Why did you make it free
reviews.review_description:
I spent 15 dollars just to get this game and now it’s free what the heck and they won’t even give you a refund so moto x if you see this please make it cost money again or give me a refund cause the 15$ that I spend was hard earned money so you just basically just threw that 15$ in the trash.

WTH😔

reviews.review_title: Used to be a great game, now it's trash
reviews.review_description: Within the first 5 seconds of opening the game, I heard some rando say "Yeah man, I hate (n words) too..." To what sounded like a 6 yr old. The Devs made an 'Impressive for Quest' dirt bike simulator, then decided to go full mobile game cash grab on it and out of extra spite, they made the hub area a public lobby where voice chats on by default. Hope you enjoy the deal you made with Satan, devs.

This used to be my top three favorite vr games, now it’s barely top ten. I just really don’t like what they are doing. I fell like, personally, that the game should go back to it’s more so realistic and kinda mature versions instead of embracing this new very kid style new version. Also, the turning of all the bikes are crap now, the airborne physics absolutely such, and I just really don’t like how the devs are pushing multiplayer. Please take all of this into consideration.

In my library I saw that this game got some sort of QOL fixes, so I was excited to try it out again. Load it up and immediately my ears are assault by some little kid screaming into the mic. I was on like 2 volume and still felt like my neighbors would hear it. Apparently the home menu is now always online, I guess? Exited the game and nearly uninstalled then and there. Decided there had to be a way to make my home menu private and gave it another shot. Instantly, there's a kid half my size with "2018" in his username all up in my business and breathing heavy into the mic. Click settings, don't see an immediate option for private home menu. Go through the ChatGPT generated "join friends" door and that's private... But it's literally just a box with a server browser on the wall. I assumed this meant I'd have to go back to squeaker city every time I want to buy a new bike or course. Didn't find out because I just got tired of it and uninstalled after that.

I get it, you can't control who plays your games. Heck, I was like 5 years old the first time I played Modern Warfare 2 (am I the unc now? 😭). But you've gotta make it easier to only have you and/or your friends in the main menu with the bike settings and dealership and all that. Look at Gorilla Tag, (never thought I'd say that) when you first load in, you're alone in the tree. You can either exit any of the holes to be randomly put into a lobby of probably toddlers, or you can set up a lobby code to play with just your friends. I'd appreciate something like that here... But maybe I'm just becoming unc now, IDK. 20-something is probably halfway in the grave at this point with all the microplastics I've been eating and items with "warning: cancer and reproductive harm" labels I've been exposed to.

reviews.review_title: The coders are dumber than a bag of rock
reviews.review_description: The coders of this game genuinely need to be fired. I love this game, but there are so many glitches at some point it should become unplayable every single time. I have to wait 2 to 3 minutes for my game to load up for these glitches happening every five minutes like your cursor randomly disappearing, or you can’t even rejoin a lobby you can’t even ￼pick a new bike and you can spawn outside of the map. You can get glitched into cars and not be able to get out unless you restart the game please fire the coders cause they are dumber than a bag of cow feces ￼

Instead of a quiet garage and settings that makes sense, nah let’s just make the main menu a random public lobby. Not only that, settings literally have nothing in them anymore. Also, Why did the developer made ts free? Their are sperm cells- 5 year olds playing ts now screaming the n word and I gives me a headache every time because their voice is so high pitch. This used to be such a good game. It was basic and easy to understand. But now this is giving off gorilla tag vibes. 0/10 couldn’t recommend unless you’re a glue eating toddler.

reviews.review_title: Physic change sucks uninstalled the game
reviews.review_description: I used to play this game for hours on end because it was so fun. I spent money and even got top 20 on the leaderboard. But then the devs decided to change the physics and make the turning more janky, wheelies dont work, you can’t whip or scrub anymore all because the devs changed the physics for no reason. Nobody likes them, so please all im asking for is for you to change them back PLEASE!!!

(P.S. please do not take this as if i was mad, I just want my money back or something equal in worth)

reviews.review_title: One of the biggest VR downfalls I seen
reviews.review_description: I ended up getting this game back when it costed around 7 dollars. I really liked this at the time and thought it was an interesting concept for a vr game, and even though there was already a few devs who’ve tried the concept of motocross racing before, MotoX was the one that I thought nailed the idea. But now, it’s somehow worse than it began. Of course now there’s some neat stuff like tricks and free to play support. But all of that doesn’t make up for all of the things that have just simply gone wrong over the past year. The lobby has changed from the regular one, where the menus were easily accesible from nearby, with a upstairs section showcasing the silhouettes of trophies you could unlock (from what I’m guessing is the now scrapped career game mode). To now being this huge open area. This is kind of good, but you have to deal with a longer walk towards the menus, and no more upstairs section which I forgot to mention had a board that would let you see what potential updates laid in store in the near future. Also you have to deal with other people on the microphone at the same time. When I go into a main menu, the last thing I want when I open up a game is little unsupervised Timmy yelling in my ear because some random person made them crash while they were going through the tracks backwards. And the handling is SO BAD that despite the fact that they semi-fixed it about a few months after the physics update, it still got worse, making it sometimes hard to take corners or adjust yourself before a jump. There’s a bit more I could say about MotoX but honestly I wish I could stop myself from buying this game if I could go back knowing what this could have become.

This game was good until I joined 5 minutes ago and o cant play any of the free maps only the tutorial. The worst part is I bought a map and now I can’t play it i cant even play ANYTHING. Please fix this and either refund me or give me my map back

I bought this game back in 2024 and have played it ever since, I’ve always loved it, always enjoyed playing it. Alone or with someone else, I’ve loved it. But now that it’s free it’s like the devs scammed tons of people and all I see and hear now is that it’s janky and you can’t do all the stuff anymore and every person that paid for it is demanding a refund. I was actually going to play it again after about 4 months of not playing and now that I’ve seen and read all the reviews I want a refund after hearing that it’s free and have spent at least 30 dollars on in-game coins and 15 on the actual game

You can walk around the lobby before this happens. I won’t repeat the things that I heard unsupervised toddlers saying in the lobby.

I’ll be happy to update my review if/when this is fixed.

reviews.review_title: I reality don't like the new physics
reviews.review_description: I've been on this game for a long time now. Spent too much money on it. I used to love playing this but they changed how the whole game feels. Way too much wheelie, janky jump faces send you sideways, and the air gyro is WAY too sensitive. Not deleting... But also not playing until this is addressed.
